typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: Latest feature commit `0cf5417116be732d49896716519067940053f545` only modifies scrutiny artifacts and contains no implementation/test code changes for the assigned crossflow fix.

`SwitcherCrossFlowTests` dashboard/popover active-indicator checks still assert renderability (`XCTAssertNotNil`) rather than concrete rendered indicator seams (e.g., active display label/accessibility label).
Cross-surface switching evidence remains store-driven via direct `setActiveProfile` mutation instead of UI callback/action paths.
Launch-chain proof remains comment/store-inference based (`Launch adapter would use ...`) without concrete launch invocation trace assertions from UI-driven action flows.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Codify VAL-CROSS evidence bars: rendered-indicator claims must assert concrete rendered labels/accessibility values, and switch/launch claims must be proven via UI callbacks and launch invocation traces (not store mutation/comments).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 8 still fails for the same renderability/store-inference pattern in `SwitcherCrossFlowTests` (dashboard/popover render assertions, direct setActiveProfile switching, and launch comment assertions).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require `followedProcedure=true` only when handoff includes concrete evidence for required manual UI sanity checks; otherwise force explicit deviation reporting.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review reported `switcher-ui-worker` step 7 requires manual UI sanity checks, but the latest handoff for session `3e0058ae-96b2-4f70-a6e6-977a9940a193` has empty `interactiveChecks` while marking `followedProcedure=true`.
